case_title: HARB, LEVY & WEILAND VS AMERICAN MARKETING GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,065.00 FILED BY HARB, LEVY & WEILAND AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN MARKETING GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CERTIFIED LETTER TO NORMAN HOTZ (AMER. MARKETING) RETURNED ILLEGIBLE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARB, LEVY & WEILAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN MARKETING GROUP $1,065.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-01-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-31-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
